offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient task allocation causes project delays. We convert construction plans into task lists and resource allocations instead of manual scheduling and task management tools.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try task list generation from construction plans on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing project data
